spec_match.rationale: The dashboard models soft-navigation entries, interaction-contentful-paint entries, navigationType, interactionId, navigationId, and largestInteractionContentfulPaint rather than relying on a generic LCP row.

interactive.rationale: Route, navigationType, and heuristic-mode controls generate live timeline rows and correlation readouts instead of a static canned card.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The concept now demonstrates per-route vitals attribution and explains the ICP interactionId match called out by the final origin-trial guidance.

edge_cases.rationale: No-paint, no-interaction, and no-URL modes produce explicit failure rows and keep them out of the qualifying soft-navigation slice.

references.rationale: The page links to ChromeStatus feature 5144837209194496, WICG Soft Navigations, Chrome final origin-trial documentation, and adjacent concepts.

design_system.rationale: The page uses CSS variables, accessible pressed-state buttons, no raw colors, no inline handlers, and no inline style attributes.

summary: The dashboard now builds route-level vitals slices from soft-navigation and interaction-contentful-paint data, including explicit failure modes for candidates that should not emit.
